buildCommand: vite build && esbuild server/_core/index.ts --platform=node --packages=external --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/server/index.mjs && node scripts/vercel-build.cjs && rm -rf node_modules/.pnpm/rollup* node_modules/.pnpm/@rollup* node_modules/.pnpm/vite* node_modules/.pnpm/@vitejs* node_modules/.pnpm/@tailwindcss* node_modules/.pnpm/vitest* node_modules/.pnpm/esbuild* && echo Removed dev deps
